internal_issues.description: V6 stale cross-ref: Section 2.2 (Tidal Pattern) should be Sections 2.3 and 2.8 (Gravity)
Finding wording H=837 km vs 8,537 at pole is parse-ambiguous (km makes no sense for g)
Square-root scaling looked like cherry-picking without bridging to any-monotonic claim
Ebbing et al. 2021 DOI 10.1029/2019JB018855 needs verification — DOI encodes 2019 submission, publication year 2021 unverified
Verdict category overload: Misleading conflates 4 failure modes — pending human decision
results.json drift: 34->35 entries, 33/34->35/35. Our review may cite stale 97.0%
Refractive index discrepancy: dome page shows n=3.49 at rim, our review cites 28.8. 2nd consecutive poll flag.

recommended_actions.action: ISS-672: Resolve refractive index discrepancy (3.49 vs 28.8). Model page explicitly shows n(r) = 1 + 0.20*(8537/H(r)-1). Check what formula we use and whether it's applied at ice wall vs. extrapolated further. If our 28.8 is wrong, this is a factual error in the review. Flagged 2 consecutive polls — urgent.

ISS-683: Verify Ebbing et al. 2021 DOI 10.1029/2019JB018855. Analyst should web-fetch the DOI and confirm publication year and paper subject. If not 2021 or wrong topic, replace with Pappa 2019 or Ferraccioli 2011.
ISS-442: Verdict taxonomy (Misleading subcategories) needs human decision. Create sub-verdict system or add taxonomy guide section? This affects how readers interpret ~30% of WINs.
